headline: One transformer layer can match full-parameter RL training
summary: A layer-wise study finds RL post-training gains concentrate in a single middle layer.

headline: A hippocampus for linear attention gives sub-quadratic models exact recall
summary: HOLA adds a small exact KV memory to a linear-attention model and beats a Transformer at 340M.

headline: Fixing RLVR's side effects with human demonstrations and an adversarial discriminator
summary: Adds a learned reward for un-verifiable qualities to preserve accuracy without reward hacking.

headline: Lynx overlaps KV-cache transfer with decoding via bit-plane speculation
summary: Splits the KV cache into anchor and residual streams to start decoding before full precision arrives.

headline: Evidence-state rewards give dense credit for long-context reasoning
summary: Maven rewards per-action edits to an editable evidence memory.

headline: Conditional co-ablation recovers hidden self-repair backups in transformer circuits
summary: CoAx exposes backup heads that single-unit ablation scores miss.

headline: WorldSample makes real-robot RL data-efficient with a grounded world model
summary: Policy-Paced Learning filters synthetic transitions to avoid value overestimation.

headline: Learning the support bounds for a categorical RL critic
summary: Jointly learns value-histogram support with the value function, removing a fixed hyperparameter.

headline: Expander sparse autoencoders make interpretability dictionaries far cheaper
summary: Constrains the SAE decoder to an expander-graph mask, cutting stored values hundreds-fold.

headline: Log_b quantization places bit levels logarithmically to fit heavy-tailed weights
summary: Distribution-aware 4-bit quantization beats linear quantization at tensor granularity.

headline: A fast wavelet-plus-t-test anomaly detector beats learned baselines on 343 datasets
summary: Unsupervised time-series anomaly detection with a statistical decision rule.

headline: Smoking-gun evidence that big black holes are built from smaller ones
summary: GWTC-5's high-spin black holes match predicted merger remnants of the low-spin population.

headline: A sign-problem-free simulation of deconfined criticality between magnetism and superconductivity
summary: Quantum Monte Carlo finds a continuous AFM-to-d-wave-SC transition via partons.

headline: A nickel-vacancy diamond qubit with all-optical control and millisecond memory
summary: NiV center reaches 1.27ms coherence at 1.65K with laser-only dynamical decoupling.

headline: Tightest test yet that neutrino mixing is unitary, from 8 years of IceCube
summary: No deviation from unitary 3x3 mixing; record bound on non-unitarity parameter.

headline: Quantum noncommutativity uniquely determines relative entropy
summary: Additivity plus optimal-measurement betting odds single out Umegaki relative entropy.

headline: Oldest Milky Way stars put the universe at 13.7 billion years, straining Hubble-tension fixes
summary: 155,600 old metal-poor stars give an age matching standard LCDM, disfavoring early-universe fixes.

headline: Two long-standing matroid conjectures fall in a four-page note
summary: Larson disproves White's conjecture and Mason's log-concavity conjecture.

headline: Explicit Gross-Zagier formula completes the 4,7 cases of Sylvester's cube-sum conjecture
summary: Certifies constructed CM points are non-torsion for primes 4,7 mod 9.

headline: DeepSeek ships fp8 DSpark quantized editions of V4
summary: Pro ~889B and Flash ~165B fp8 builds for cheaper serving, MIT license.

headline: Google releases a tabular foundation model for zero-shot table prediction
summary: tabfm does in-context classification/regression on new tables without task training.

headline: Anthropic launches Claude Sonnet 5 with a new tokenizer that lifts effective cost
summary: Near-Opus performance, 1M context, but ~30-40% more tokens for English/code.

headline: SpudCell: a chemically defined synthetic cell completes a full cell cycle
summary: A from-scratch cell of 150-200 molecule types grows, replicates, divides over ~5 generations.

headline: Germline-targeting vaccines elicit broadly neutralizing HIV antibodies in primates
summary: Staged priming/boosting drives apex-directed bnAbs in non-human primates.

headline: COMPASS foundation model predicts cancer immunotherapy response across tumor types
summary: Predicts immunotherapy benefit from bulk tumor transcriptomes, generalizing across cancers.

headline: Splice-switching small molecule CP3 cuts prion protein by 70 percent
summary: Risdiplam-derived molecule activates a cryptic PRNP exon to degrade its mRNA.

headline: Engineered base editor permanently corrects familial dysautonomia mutation
summary: Cytosine base editor restores ELP1 splicing with ~70% correction in human cells.

headline: A virtual yeast models a eukaryotic cell with an AI agent
summary: Nature paper on an AI-driven virtual eukaryotic cell for in-silico perturbation prediction.

headline: Netflix GenPage generates a personalized homepage autoregressively
summary: Single generative model builds the page one element at a time versus pipeline-of-rankers.

headline: 'It's hard to eval' is a product smell
summary: Hamel Husain argues eval difficulty signals a product-design problem, not an evals problem.

headline: JWST keeps breaking cosmological models
summary: Quanta surveys early black holes, mature galaxies, and little red dots that theory did not predict.

headline: Understand to participate: cognitive debt with coding agents
summary: Willison relays Litt's framing that collaborating with coding agents requires deep code understanding.

headline: Iran's Supreme Leader Khamenei dies; state funeral in Tehran
summary: Death follows a war and a just-signed Iran-US framework accord.
